creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
>Was the addition of libintl LIB_DEPENDS intentional, and did upstream introduce >this in this version, or is it a missing or other dependency for existing port >versions?

poudriere-testport(8) reported it as missing to me, this needs further investigation.
